title: Eyrie Checker Configuration
description: Configuration schema for Eyrie checker mode

upstream_url.description: URL of the Eyrie server to register with and submit results to

name.description: Optional checker name. Defaults to region if not set. Used for checker targeting via checker_names in monitor config

region.description: Geographic region identifier. Used as fallback checker identification if name is not set

api_key.description: API key for authentication with the server

sentry.description: Sentry error monitoring and tracing configuration

dsn.description: Sentry DSN for error reporting and tracing

trace_outgoing_requests.description: Enable tracing of outgoing HTTP requests to the server
